memberdef.argsstring: (int r, int g, int b, float a=1.0f)
memberdef.name: NormalizeColor

briefdescription.para: Initialize and register all GUI programs.

detaileddescription.para: Called during ImGui initialization to register all available GUI programs with the GuiProgramManager. Programs can then be activated/deactivated dynamically during runtime.

memberdef.argsstring: (nb::list &commands, nb::dict shared_data, std::shared_ptr< EntityInterface > hoveredEntityInterface_ptr, std::shared_ptr< EntityInterface > selectedEntityInterface_ptr)
memberdef.name: ShowGadgetsWindow

memberdef.argsstring: (int worldTicks, float availableFps, std::shared_ptr< World > world_ptr, nb::dict physicsChanges, nb::dict inventoryData, nb::list &consoleLogs, nb::list &entitiesData, nb::list &commands, nb::dict statistics, nb::dict &shared_data, std::shared_ptr< EntityInterface > entityInterface_ptr, std::shared_ptr< EntityInterface > hoveredEntityInterface_ptr, std::shared_ptr< EntityInterface > selectedEntityInterface_ptr)
memberdef.name: renderInGameGuiFrame

briefdescription.para: Renders the complete ImGui frame for in-game (gameplay) mode.

detaileddescription.para: This function orchestrates the rendering of all GUI windows and panels during active gameplay. It handles frame initialization, renders various game windows (settings, inventory, stats, etc.), processes user input through the console, and manages drag-drop operations between UI elements and the game world.

parameterdescription.para: Current game world tick count (simulation time step)
Current frames per second for performance monitoring
Shared pointer to the game world (can be nullptr when world is not loaded)
Dictionary containing physics settings that can be modified via GUI
Dictionary containing current player inventory state
List of console log messages to display
List of entity data for the entities stats window
Output list where GUI-generated commands are appended (e.g., item transfers, settings changes)
Dictionary containing AI statistics for visualization
Shared state dictionary for inter-module communication
Interface to a generic entity for inspection
Interface to the currently hovered entity (if any)
Interface to the currently selected entity (if any)

simplesect.para: This function is called once per frame during gameplay mode.
The function renders windows conditionally based on user interactions (toggle flags).
